title: C94 — Separation Principle in a Second Substrate: s ⊥ m | X realised as a running build on Archo…

story.text:
# C94
**Separation Principle in a Second Substrate: s ⊥ m | X realised as a running build on Archon did:cid — the model holds independent of its stones; a second-forge realisation strengthens the abstract convergence case (C34–C37).**

*Confidence:* ~55% · *Status:* active · registered 2026-07-01 (Tome X) · *Register:* city
*Home:* grimoire v1.9.1 · cityofmages Tome X Act 1 · spellweb conj-c94

Band X · The Hearthold Reading · registered 2026-07-01 (cityofmages Tome X — The Hearth)
